Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER compared to the average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Request Payment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to be done in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus rejected variants (ending in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where the pre-approver is the only approver before the supervisor
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases with multiple resubmissions after rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that do not involve any other approval role
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time until Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER is performed in cases that eventually reach Payment Handled without any rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in 2017 versus 2018, considering the expansion of data collection from two departments to the entire university
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'year'}"
